items.docs: **Instruction:** `accountQuery`

Update account settings.

**Instruction:** `accountUpdate`

Retrieves the maxmimum quantity an account can borrow
for a given asset based on the accounts existing exposure
and margin requirements

**Instruction:** `maxBorrowQuantity`

params.name: price
params.description: The limit price of the order. Not included for market orders.

params.name: reduceOnly
params.description: Whether the order is reduce only.

params.name: autoBorrow
params.description: Whether the order uses auto borrow.

params.name: autoBorrowRepay
params.description: Whether the order uses auto borrow repay.

params.name: autoLendRedeem
params.description: Whether the order uses auto lend redeem.

items.docs:
Retrieves the maxmimum quantity an account can trade
for a given symbol based on the account's balances, existing exposure
and margin requirements.

**Instruction:** `maxOrderQuantity`

params.name: autoBorrow
params.description: Whether the withdrawal is with auto borrow.

params.name: autoLendRedeem
params.description: Whether the withdrawal is with auto lend redeem.

items.docs:
Retrieves the maxmimum quantity an account can withdraw
for a given asset based on the accounts existing exposure
and margin requirements
The response will include the maximum quantity that can be withdrawn
and whether the withdrawal is with auto borrow or auto lend redeem
enabled.

**Instruction:** `maxWithdrawalQuantity`

Converts a dust balance to USDC. The balance (including lend) must be
less than the minimum quantity tradable on the spot order book.

**Instruction:** `convertDust`

Retrieves account balances and the state of the balances (locked or
available).

Locked assets are those that are currently in an open order.

**Instruction:** `balanceQuery`

Retrieves collateral information for an account.

**Instruction:** `collateralQuery`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

params.name: excludePlatform
params.description: Exclude platform deposits originating from the exchange.

items.docs:
Retrieves deposit history.

**Instruction:** `depositQueryAll`

params.name: blockchain
params.description: Blockchain symbol to get a deposit address for.

items.docs:
Retrieves the user specific deposit address if the user were to deposit
on the specified blockchain.

**Instruction:** `depositAddressQuery`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
Retrieves withdrawal history.

**Instruction:** `withdrawalQueryAll`

Requests a withdrawal from the exchange.

The `twoFactorToken` field is required if the withdrawal address is not
an address that is configured in the address book to not require
2FA.

To configure a 2FA exempt address, please [add an
address](https://backpack.exchange/settings/address-book) to the address book
and toggle the `Two Factor Authentication Required` option.

**Instruction:** `withdraw`

params.name: id
params.description: Filter to a given dust conversion id.

params.name: country
params.description:
Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. When provided, the token
list is filtered to the assets available in that jurisdiction.

Retrieves all the open borrow lending positions for the account.

**Instruction:** `borrowLendPositionQuery`

Retrieves the estimated liquidation price for a potential borrow lend
position.
**Instruction:** `borrowLendExecute`

params.name: type
params.description: Filter to history for either borrows or lends.

params.name: sources
params.description:
Filter to return history for a particular source. Can be a single
source, or multiple sources separated by commas.

params.name: positionId
params.description: Filter to return history for a borrow lend position.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
History of borrow and lend operations for the account.

**Instruction:** `borrowHistoryQueryAll`

params.name: asset
params.description: Asset to query. If not set, all assets are returned.

params.name: symbol
params.description:
Market symbol to query. If not set, all markets are returned. If a
futures symbol is supplied, then interest payments on unrealized pnl
will be returned. Spot market symbols refer to interest payments on
regular borrow lend positions.

params.name: positionId
params.description: Filter to return history for a borrow lend position.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

params.name: source
params.description:
Filter to return interest payments of a particular source. Borrow
interest payments through two mechanisms: borrow lend
positions; interest paid on unrealized pnl.

items.docs:
History of the interest payments for borrows and lends for the account.

params.name: side
params.description: Return only borrows or only lends.

params.name: state
params.description: Return only open positions or closed positions.

params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

History of borrow and lend positions for the account.

Retrieves mark prices, index prices, and funding rates for futures
products, or a specified symbol.

Retrieves the current open interest for the given market.
If no market is provided, then all markets are returned.

params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `10000`.

items.docs: Funding interval rate history for futures.

params.name: endTime
params.description: UTC timestamp in seconds. Defaults to now.

items.docs:
Returns candles for the given market and interval. Recent data is
served from the in-memory store; requests reaching further back
than the store's retention window fall through to ClickHouse.

info.name: Get ticker for a single market.

items.docs: Get ticker for a single market.
Get tickers for every market.

Retrieves an open order from the order book. This only returns the order
if it is resting on the order book (i.e. has not been completely filled,
expired, or cancelled).

One of `orderId` or `clientId` must be specified. If both are specified
then the request will be rejected.

**Instruction:** `orderQuery`

Submits an order to the matching engine for execution.

**Instruction:** `orderExecute`

Cancels an open order from the order book.

One of `orderId` or `clientId` must be specified. If both are specified
then the request will be rejected.

**Instruction:** `orderCancel`

params.name: marketType
params.description: The market for the orders (SPOT or PERP).

params.name: symbol
params.description: The symbol of the market for the orders.

items.docs:
Retrieves all open orders. If a symbol is provided, only open orders for
that market will be returned, otherwise all open orders are
returned.

**Instruction:** `orderQueryAll`

Submits a set of orders to the matching engine for execution in a batch.

**Batch commands instruction:** `orderExecute`

Cancels all open orders on the specified market.

**Instruction:** `orderCancelAll`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

params.name: fillType
params.description: Filter to return fills for different fill types

items.docs:
Retrieves historical fills, with optional filtering for a specific order
or symbol.

**Instruction:** `fillHistoryQueryAll`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
Retrieves the order history for the user. This includes orders that have
been filled and are no longer on the book. It may include orders
that are on the book, but the `/orders` endpoint contains more up to
date data.

**Instruction:** `orderHistoryQueryAll`

params.name: symbol
params.description: Filter for a single position by symbol.

params.description: The market for the orders (SPOT or PERP).

Retrieves historical positions, with optional filtering for a specific symbol.

**Instruction:** `positionHistoryQueryAll`

Submit a quote in response to an RFQ. If valid, the quote may be
accepted within the specified time window.

**Instruction:** `quoteSubmit`

params.name: deferredSettlement
params.description:
Filter for deferred settlement RFQs only (`true`), non-deferred
only (`false`), or return all (`null`/omitted).

items.docs:
Retrieves open RFQs submitted by the account, along with the quotes
submitted for them. Optionally filter by symbol, RFQ ID, or deferred
settlement status.

**Instruction:** `rfqQuery`

Submit an RFQ (Request For Quote). The RFQ will be available for
a specified time window for makers to respond to.

**Instruction:** `rfqSubmit`

Accept a specific quote from a maker in response to an RFQ.

**Instruction:** `quoteAccept`

Refresh a RFQ, extending the time window it is available for.

**Instruction:** `rfqRefresh`
**Instruction:** `rfqCancel`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

params.name: deferredSettlement
params.description: Filter to deferred settlement RFQs only (`true`) or non-deferred only (`false`).

items.docs:
This includes RFQs that have been filled or expired.

**Instruction:** `rfqHistoryQueryAll`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

params.name: deferredSettlement
params.description: Filter to deferred settlement quotes only (`true`) or non-deferred only (`false`).

items.docs:
Retrieves the quote history for the user. This includes quotes that have
been filled or expired.

**Instruction:** `quoteHistoryQueryAll`

params.name: fillType
params.description: Filter by fill type (system order type).

params.name: deferredSettlement
params.description: If `true`, return only deferred settlement fills. If `false`, return only non-deferred settlement fills. If omitted, return fills regardless of settlement type.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
Retrieves RFQ fill history for the user.

**Instruction:** `rfqFillHistoryQueryAll`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
Retrieves the quote fill history for the user.

**Instruction:** `quoteFillHistoryQueryAll`

Retrieves an open strategy from the engine. This only returns the
strategy if it is active (i.e. has not been completely filled,
cancelled by the user, or cancelled by the system).

One of `strategyId` or `clientStrategyId` must be specified.

**Instruction:** `strategyQuery`

Submits a strategy to the engine for processing.

**Instruction:** `strategyCreate`

Cancels an open strategy currently being run.

One of `strategyId` or `clientStrategyId` must be specified.

**Instruction:** `strategyCancel`

params.name: marketType
params.description: The market for the strategies (SPOT or PERP).

params.name: symbol
params.description: The symbol of the market for the strategies.

items.docs:
Retrieves all open strategies. If a symbol is provided, only open
strategies for that market will be returned, otherwise all open
strategies are returned.

**Instruction:** `strategyQueryAll`

Cancels all open strategies on the specified market.

**Instruction:** `strategyCancelAll`

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number to return. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
Retrieves the strategy history for the user. This returns strategies
that are no longer active as they have either been
completed, cancelled by the user or cancelled by the system.

**Instruction:** `strategyHistoryQueryAll`
Get system status.
Responds with `pong`.
Retrieves the current system time.
Returns all configured blockchain wallets and their addresses.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Market symbol to query fills for.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of fills returned. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
Retrieve the most recent trades for a symbol. This is public data and
is not specific to any account.

The maximum available recent trades is `1000`. If you need more than
`1000` trades use the historical trades endpoint.

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit the number of trades returned. Default `100`, maximum `1000`.

items.docs:
Retrieves all historical trades for the given symbol. This is public
trade data and is not specific to any account.
Returns information about all available vaults on the exchange.

Deposits an asset into a vault and receives vault tokens in return.

**Instruction:** `vaultMint`

Submits a request to redeem vault tokens for USDC. The request will be
queued and attempted after the vault's redeem delay period.

**Instruction:** `vaultRedeemRequest`

Cancels a pending redeem request for a vault.

**Instruction:** `vaultRedeemCancel`

params.name: vaultId
params.description: The vault ID to get pending redeems for.

items.docs:
Returns pending redeem requests for a vault. Only accessible when
authenticated with a key registered to the vault's system account.

**Instruction:** `vaultPendingRedeemsQuery`

Returns live NAV data for a vault, including spot NAV, TWAP NAV,
mint NAV, and redeem NAV. Only accessible by the vault's own account.

**Instruction:** `vaultNavQuery`

params.name: vaultId
params.description: Optional vault ID to filter by.

items.docs:
Returns historical vault data - NAV, vault equity,
and tokens in circulation at regular intervals.

Retrieves the configured hourly delay for withdrawals to non-whitelisted
addresses. This security feature adds a time delay before withdrawals are
processed, allowing time to cancel unauthorized withdrawals.

Enables a configurable hourly delay for withdrawals to non-whitelisted
addresses. This security feature helps protect the account by adding a
time buffer before withdrawals are processed. Requires 2FA verification.

Updates the hourly delay for withdrawals to non-whitelisted addresses.
Changes will take effect after the current delay period ends. Requires
2FA verification.
